# SOL Auto Mapper Agent

This agent/skill combination helps you generate broad, repeatable mapping datasets from the SOL manifold.

Primary goal: capture lots of *raw* data (trace + summary + manifest) across parameter sweeps so later tools can build a hippocampus-style map of variable relations.

Start here:
- Skill bundle: `.github/skills/sol-auto-mapper/skill.md`
- Mapping plan example: `.github/skills/sol-auto-mapper/templates/mapping_plan.example.json`
